curation_notes: The patch commit (PR #889) replaces the auto-derived Deserialize for VecStorage with a manual implementation that validates nrows * ncols == data.len(). Only one non-test source file (src/base/vec_storage.rs) was modified. The vulnerable code is the derive(Deserialize) attribute on the VecStorage struct, which generated a deserializer without bounds checking. Location derived from the patch diff since the advisory does not name specific files.
